name: Croda
author: Ljuban Dedić (1995); AGP port
description: Ljuban Dedić's orthogonal draughts on all 64 squares of a chess board: 24 men each on the first three ranks. Men move one square straight or diagonally forward but capture orthogonally in all four directions by the short leap; kings move like rooks and capture by the long leap. Mandatory maximum capture with deferred removal (the Coup Turc). Leave the opponent without a legal move to win. Championed by Christian Freeling as the cure for draughts' draw margin.
